Blog
The Purple app

One app. Every kind of connection.

Staff, guests, and residents all connect through the same Purple app. It's the engine behind identity-based access, the layer that removes captive-portal friction, and the channel that keeps every connection going after the first login.

One app, three jobsThe same app authenticates staff, recognizes returning guests, and provisions resident networks, depending on which Purple product is deployed.
Nothing for IT to installThe app lives on the end user's own device. There's no agent to roll out and no extra hardware to manage.
Built on identity, not passwordsEvery connection through the app is tied to a verified identity, not a shared credential that has to be rotated or reset.
Where the app shows up

Three products. One app underneath all of them.

Staff WiFi
The authentication engine
Staff authenticate once with existing SSO credentials, Entra ID, Google Workspace, or Okta, and receive a unique, unshareable certificate-based profile. The app then grants access across the entire estate, on every device: Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android. When someone leaves the identity provider, the app revokes their access automatically.
Guest WiFi
The friction remover
Captive portals still frustrate visitors with forms. The app replaces that with seamless connectivity and a conscious opt-in, done once. From then on, the app recognizes returning visitors automatically, and becomes a channel for offers and loyalty to people who are physically in the venue.
Multi-tenant WiFi
The resident's remote control
Residents provision a network pass directly in the app. Devices auto-connect and isolate, and reconnect automatically on every future visit, to any property in the chain. The app doubles as an engagement channel: surveys, location-aware content, notifications, and rewards.
Why it matters to a sale

One conversation, three upsells.

A familiar engine

A customer already running Guest WiFi through the app has a shorter path to Staff WiFi or Multi-tenant. The end-user experience doesn't change, just what the app is being used for.

Less for IT to manage

Nothing for a customer's IT team to install or patch. The app lives on end-user devices, and the identity infrastructure behind it is the same platform already trusted by 80,000+ venues.

A channel that keeps paying off

Every opted-in connection through the app is a contact a customer can message again, whether that's a loyalty offer to a guest or a notification to a resident.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.

Partners
Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
